chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Misc. Application No.1070 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For orders on M.A. No.17605/2025 For hearing of main case -------------------------------------------- 04.02.2026 Mr. Azhar Hussain, advocate for applicant Ms. Seema Zaidi, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh SIP Amir Malik of PS Gulberg ------------------------------------------- Learned counsel for applicant, after arguing the matter at some length, does not press the instant criminal miscellaneous application and intends to approach the concerned Guardian and Wards Court for custody of minor Abdullah, aged about six years. Order accordingly. Instant criminal miscellaneous application is dismissed as not pressed. J U D G E Gusher/PS
